name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for the editor
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

## Description
<!-- A clear description of the feature you'd like to see -->

## Problem It Solves
<!-- Describe the user problem or workflow it improves -->

## Suggested Solution
<!-- How should this work? What would the workflow look like? -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Other approaches you've considered -->

## Use Cases
<!-- Who would benefit? Give 1-3 concrete examples -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any sketches, screenshots, or links to similar features in other editors -->
